title: fagelia canescens
intro: Fagelia canescens, also known as the woolly fagelia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fagelia canescens include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Fagelia canescens is often prepared as a tea or infused oil for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
